author: plasmabit
description: Show a clock in the corner. Track the total editing time of a note and the last time it was modified.

manifest.author: Nick Winters
manifest.description: Show clock in the corner. Track total editing time of a note and the last time it was modified.

name: Time Things

releases.author: plasmabit
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix ctrl+Z issue and update package version by @plasmabit in https://github.com/plasmabit/timethings/pull/32


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/plasmabit/timethings/compare/1.4.0...1.4.1
releases.name: Time Things 1.4.1

releases.author: plasmabit

- Code refactoring

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/plasmabit/timethings/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0
releases.name: Time Things 1.4.0

releases.author: plasmabit
releases.description: Added a new view which allows you to see most edited notes in your vault
releases.name: Time Things 1.3.0

releases.author: plasmabit
releases.description:
## 🎁 Features requested

- Now you have an option to hide emojis plugin-wide. Per [this](https://github.com/DynamicPlayerSector/timethings/discussions/12) feature request

[Installation guide](https://github.com/DynamicPlayerSector/timethings/wiki/Installation-Guide)
releases.name: Time Things 1.2.6

releases.author: plasmabit
releases.description:
## 🦗 Bug fixes

- Now it is possible to pick a note from the suggested ones if you are using the custom solution

## 🤖 Saner code

- Code structure improvement

[Installation guide](https://github.com/DynamicPlayerSector/timethings/wiki/Installation-Guide)
releases.name: Time Things 1.2.5

releases.author: plasmabit
releases.description:
## 🦗 Bug fixes

- Now the plugin does not interfere with undo operations and other ctrl shortcuts

## 🤖 Saner code

- Code structure improvements
- Cleared one console.log which was printing in the release build

[Installation guide](https://github.com/DynamicPlayerSector/timethings/wiki/Installation-Guide)
releases.name: Time Things 1.2.4

releases.author: plasmabit
releases.description: - Added an ability to choose the value of non-typing editing time percentage variable in the settings
releases.name: Time Things 1.2.2

releases.author: plasmabit
releases.description:
Changes:

- Dynamically rendered settings menu
- Fixed one event being not registered
- Plugin doesn't rely on custom frontmatter solution to get the value of `edited_seconds` if it's disabled in the settings anymore
- Saner code for the function that updates the status bar which shows how long has this note has been edited for
releases.name: Time Things 1.2.1

releases.author: plasmabit
releases.description:
###  Track total edited time

Introducing edit duration frontmatter variable. Track time spent on editing a note.

![Obsidian_M7cBoaBPIq](https://github.com/DynamicPlayerSector/timethings/assets/65742767/708ca815-165b-487a-a4b5-2064fc9437c9)
releases.name: Time Things 1.2.0

releases.author: plasmabit
releases.description:
### Custom frontmatter solution

Introducing custom frontmatter handling solution for smoother experience. It instantly and unobtrusively updates the "modified" timestamp value with each keystroke.
releases.name: Time Things 1.1.0
